subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-01-28
subcodes.first_line: Man cannot comprehend the essence of God. He is the limited and God's essence is the unlimited. All the attributes referable to God, such as omnipotent, Omniscient, merciful are only qualifying attributes
subcodes.subjects: @identity; relationship of Manifestation of God to God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @Manifestation of God as mirror
